phrases.text_local: Onde fica a administração do mercado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH uhd-mee-neesht-ruh-SOWN DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff typically give concise directions without extra details.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a administração no piso superior.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH uhd-mee-neesht-ruh-SOWN NOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the office on the upper floor.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the office on the upper floor.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH uhd-mee-neesht-ruh-SOWN NOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a administração no piso superior.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the market office is
phrases.text_local: Por favor, onde fica o escritório do mercado?
phrases.pronunciation: POOR fuh-VOHR, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW shkree-TAWR-yoo DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: The market office is upstairs, accessible via the central courtyard stairs. It also houses administrative services.

likely_response.local: O escritório do mercado fica no andar de cima.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW shkree-TAWR-yoo DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo FEE-kuh NOO ahnng-DAHR DIH SEE-muh.

responses.phonetic: AW shkree-TAWR-yoo DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo FEE-kuh NOO ahnng-DAHR DIH SEE-muh.
responses.french: O escritório do mercado fica no andar de cima.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where black scabbardfish is sold
phrases.text_local: Onde se vende o peixe-espada preto?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH VAYNG-dih AW PAY-shih-SHPAH-duh PREH-too?
phrases.cultural_note: Black scabbardfish (espada preto) is a Madeiran specialty, commonly found at the fish section (Secção de Peixe) of the market.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, procure na Secção de Peixe.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, proo-KOO-rih NUH SEH-sown DIH PAY-shih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, look in the Fish Section.

responses.english: Good morning, look in the Fish Section.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, proo-KOO-rih NUH SEH-sown DIH PAY-shih.
responses.french: Bom dia, procure na Secção de Peixe.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the market office is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o escritório do mercado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW shkree-TAWR-yoo DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Administrative areas are often upstairs to save ground space.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao fiscal ou na caixa.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW feesh-KAHL OHW NUH KEYE-shuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the market attendant or at the cashier.

responses.english: Ask the market attendant or at the cashier.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW feesh-KAHL OHW NUH KEYE-shuh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao fiscal ou na caixa.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where black scabbardfish is sold
phrases.cultural_note: Specialty fish vendors are well-known and easy to locate by name.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a secção de peixe?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SEH-sown DIH PAY-shih?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Secção de Peixe.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SEH-sown DIH PAY-shih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Fish Section.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Fish Section.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SEH-sown DIH PAY-shih.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Secção de Peixe.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the central courtyard is
phrases.text_local: Onde se situa o pátio central do mercado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH see-TOOUH AW PAHT-yoo sayngt-RAHL DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Courtyards serve as natural navigation hubs in Portuguese markets.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, o Pátio Central fica no meio.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AW PAHT-yoo sayngt-RAHL FEE-kuh NOO MAYOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the Central Courtyard is in the middle.

responses.english: Good morning, the Central Courtyard is in the middle.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AW PAHT-yoo sayngt-RAHL FEE-kuh NOO MAYOO.
responses.french: Bom dia, o Pátio Central fica no meio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fish section is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a secção de peixe?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SEH-sown DIH PAY-shih?
phrases.cultural_note: The market layout uses specific Portuguese section names.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Secção de Peixe.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SEH-sown DIH PAY-shih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Fish Section.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Fish Section.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SEH-sown DIH PAY-shih.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Secção de Peixe.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o escritório do mercado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW shkree-TAWR-yoo DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: The market office is located upstairs, near the restaurant. Staff can assist with lost items or general inquiries.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, o escritório fica no piso superior.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AW shkree-TAWR-yoo FEE-kuh NOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the office is on the upper floor.

responses.english: Good morning, the office is on the upper floor.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AW shkree-TAWR-yoo FEE-kuh NOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR.
responses.french: Bom dia, o escritório fica no piso superior.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao fiscal no Pátio Central; ele pode indicar a localização.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW feesh-KAHL NOO PAHT-yoo sayngt-RAHL; EH-lih PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the market attendant in the Central Courtyard; they can point out the location.

responses.english: Ask the market attendant in the Central Courtyard; they can point out the location.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW feesh-KAHL NOO PAHT-yoo sayngt-RAHL; EH-lih PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN.
responses.french: Pergunte ao fiscal no Pátio Central; ele pode indicar a localização.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the flower stall is
phrases.text_local: Onde encontro a Bancada de Flores?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo AH bahnng-KAH-duh DIH FLOH-rihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Flower vendors are traditionally positioned near main access points.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Bancada de Flores.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bahnng-KAH-duh DIH FLOH-rihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Flower Stall.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Flower Stall.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bahnng-KAH-duh DIH FLOH-rihsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Bancada de Flores.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Pátio Central.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PAHT-yoo sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Central Courtyard.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Central Courtyard.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PAHT-yoo sayngt-RAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Pátio Central.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I find black scabbardfish?
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar espada preto aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR SHPAH-duh PREH-too uh-KEE?
phrases.cultural_note: Black scabbardfish is a Madeiran specialty, clearly marked locally.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, procure a bancada do Espada Preto.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, proo-KOO-rih AH bahnng-KAH-duh DOO SHPAH-duh PREH-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, look for the Espada Preto stall.

responses.english: Good morning, look for the Espada Preto stall.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, proo-KOO-rih AH bahnng-KAH-duh DOO SHPAH-duh PREH-too.
responses.french: Bom dia, procure a bancada do Espada Preto.
